ab: Meiyah sapah gbiyan kiya da swayi snaw.
ch: 今天傍晚，弟弟就要回家了。
en: My younger brother is going home this evening.

ab: Yaku ni bubu rudan o musa nami marig hiyi rudux brigan damac, sramal swayi snaw mhapuy uqun keeman.
ch: 我和奶奶去市場買雞，準備煮好吃的晚餐給弟弟。
en: My grandma and I went to the market to buy chickens and prepared a delicious dinner for my younger brother.

ab: Mnuda nami bbrigan sama, niqan egu bi klgan sama ka bbrigan sama hiya.
ch: 我們經過了菜攤，那裏有好多新鮮的青菜。
en: We passed the vegetable stand, which had a lot of fresh green vegetables.

ab: Bnarig nami eyncay, lmbay ni ningjing.
ch: 我們買了空心菜、山藥和胡蘿蔔。
en: We bought water spinach, yams and carrots.

ab: Rmngaw ka gaga mniq siyaw bbrigan hiyi qhuni embbarig, “Shiya bi uqun ka kalac mu ni qlupas mu, brigi cikuh hug!” msa.
ch: 在旁邊水果攤的老闆說:「我的鳳梨和桃子很甜。買一些吧!」
en: The owner of the nearby fruit stand said: “My pineapples and peaches are very sweet. Buy some!”

ab: Muda nami bbrigan hiyi rudux siida, rmngaw ka embbarig, “Marig su manu hug? Paru ni msiyang ka hiyi rudux nii, kingal o tru kbkuy brigan.” msa.
ch: 我們經過了肉攤，老闆說:「你要買什麼?今天的雞又大又肥，一隻300元。」
en: We passed the meat stall, and the boss said, “What do you want to buy? Today’s chickens are big and fat, and one is 300 NTD.”

ab: Sihan mkray bi brigan bubu rudan, kiya ni smiling embbarig, “Ya tduwa mhnuk hari brigan hug?”
ch: 奶奶覺得太貴了，問老闆:「可不可以便宜一點？」
en: Grandma thought it was too expensive and asked the boss if it could be cheaper.

ab: Kiya ka kiya ni embbarig o suqi mhnuk da! msa rmngaw ka embbarig, uxay tduwa blihun da.
ch: 但老闆說已經很便宜，不能再減了。
en: But the boss said that it is already very cheap and cannot be reduced any further.

ab: Siyaw na embbarig o, “Aguh marig qsurux mu, paru ni mhnuk brigan ka qsurux mu.” msa.
ch: 隔壁的老闆說，來買我的魚，我的魚又大又便宜。
en: The boss next door said, come and buy my fish, my fish is big and cheap.

ab: Hici do bnarig nami hiyi rudux ni hiyi qsurux, musa nami sapah do egu ka hnapuy nami damac.
ch: 最後我們買了雞也買了魚，回家煮了一桌子的菜。
en: In the end we bought chicken and fish, and went home to cook a table of food.

ab: Bsiyaq ka tnaga do, mkuung ka karac da.
en: After waiting for a long time, it was already dark.

ab: Miyah ka qnawal swayi snaw rmngaw, “ini tduwa msangay ka hey-tay, asi ka babaw jiyax sngayan do kika miyah ku da.” msa.
ch: 弟弟打電話回來說，軍隊突然不能放假了，要下一個禮拜日才回來。
en: The younger brother called back and said that the army suddenly couldn’t take a vacation and would not be back until the next Sunday.

ab: Rmngaw ka bubu rudan, “Egu balay ka hnapuy damac, lwani kana ka dhiya, aguh mkan” ksa.
ch: 奶奶說:「已經煮了這麼多，叫大家一起來吃吧!」
en: Grandma said that she has cooked so much, so let’s eat together!

ab: Lwanun nami ka lupung ni dangi, aguh seupu mkan egu nhapuy keeman.
ch: 我們邀請了親朋好友，一起來享用豐盛的晚餐。
en: We invited friends and family to have a great dinner together.
